calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-30-2011 Text Ruling

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-30-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: D. Hakewill/M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Dipak Patel is present in pro per.
Defendant Carl Griaraffa is present.
Attorney Casey McTigue representing the defendant through limited scope.

Litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

This case settled per plaintiff. The parties advised the settlement attorney that they met, confered and settled.

The trial date of DEC-5-2011 is vacated.
